allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add safe area inset for status bar and fixed header

- Add viewport-fit=cover meta tag for safe area support
- Add body padding for safe area inset
- Add purple pseudo-element to fill status bar area
- Make user header bar fixed position below safe area

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(php -l golfers.php tournaments.php rounds.php matches.php hole_scores.php match_golfers.php match_results.php tournament_golfers.php tournament_teams.php tournament_settings.php tournament_formats.php flights.php golfers_flights.php)
